column1: Aaron Judge leads the slate with a favorable matchup against Bailey Falter, benefiting from a park boost and the platoon advantage. Judge’s steady track record—hitting safely in two-thirds of his games—makes him a reliable option to record a hit. Cody Bellinger also profiles well, showing consistent contact and a similar matchup, while Ketel Marte and Corbin Carroll offer upside thanks to recent form and advantageous splits. Judge remains the top pick for consistency and matchup quality.
